name: Pallet Town

npcs.name: Professor Oak
dialogue: Hello there! Welcome to the world of Pokemon!
My name is Oak. People call me the Pokemon Professor!
This world is inhabited by creatures called Pokemon!
For some people, Pokemon are pets. Others use them for fights.
Myself... I study Pokemon as a profession.

npcs.name: Gary
dialogue: Hey! I'm Gary, Professor Oak's grandson!
I'm going to be the world's greatest Pokemon trainer!
You better not get in my way!

npcs.name: Young Boy
dialogue: You can now store and recall Pokemon from PCs!

description: A quiet town of new beginnings
